test_framework: No test framework (no tests directory found)
verification_instructions: Run TypeScript type-check (npx tsc --noEmit) and Vite build (npx vite build) to ensure no compilation errors
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md found. Maintain existing code style and patterns.
key_patterns: Zustand store (src/store/gameStore.ts), i18n with useT() hook, Icon components in src/components/Icons.tsx, CLANS array in src/types/game.ts with {id, name, color, initialHonor}. Game logic in src/utils/gameLogic.ts. GameLog uses applyPattern() to replace text segments with React nodes for icons/styling.
directory_structure: src/components/ (React components), src/utils/gameLogic.ts (core game logic), src/store/gameStore.ts (Zustand store), src/types/game.ts (types + constants like CLANS), src/i18n/ (translations)
